vibe: Aman Resorts meets Rapha. White-glove concierge-level service. Premium imagery, generous whitespace, serif/sans pairing, muted sophisticated palette.

layout_spacing.grid_strategy: Tetris grid for asymmetrical bento layouts. Avoid generic equal-column cards.
layout_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or minimal rounded-sm for a sharp, editorial feel

component_instructions.header: Crystal Glass style. backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F7F5F0]/70. Minimalist navigation, sticky top.
component_instructions.hero: Editorial layout. Do not use generic center-aligned text over a dark image. Use a large, high-quality image either in a framed bento box or split screen, with extremely large serif typography (Cormorant Garamond) on the side.
component_instructions.buttons: Solid flat colors. No heavy drop shadows. Primary CTA: bg-[#2C3E35] text-white hover:bg-[#1A2620] transition-colors duration-300.
component_instructions.cards: Flat, 1px border (#E5E3DB), no shadow. Generous internal padding (p-8 or p-12).
component_instructions.animations: Use framer-motion for slow, elegant fade-ins and stagger children. Include lenis for smooth scrolling.

images.description: Cyclist in motion with blurred background, representing high performance and speed.
Close up of runner's legs in motion on pavement.
Open water swimmers in a race.
Cyclists racing on a road with motion blur.
Aerial view of Nice, France coastline.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use framer-motion for all interactions. Implement slow staggered reveal animations on scroll.
Do NOT use standard rounded cards with heavy shadows. Use flat, sharp borders (border-[#E5E3DB]) to emulate print editorial.
Ensure headings use Cormorant Garamond (add via Google Fonts in index.html or global css).
Body text must be Manrope (add via Google Fonts).
The hero section should have an asymmetrical grid with large typography, separating it visually from standard 'cheap' travel booking sites.
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide icons for minimalist strokes.
